creator: tobik@freebsd.org
text:
Committed with some changes.  Thanks!

Please try and test your submissions with 'poudriere testport' or 'synth test'.
It makes this much easier for us.  I had to add a build dependency on asciidoc
otherwise it didn't build correctly.

I also removed some old stuff that came from the old newsbeuter port and doesn't
apply anymore.

The PODCAST option is gone since it didn't appear to do much.  I hope this is ok.
